summary: Jerry 正在测试 EchoForge 的音频理解和 skill 触发流程，确认模型是否能正确处理音频并生成结构化工件。

utterances.speaker: Jerry
utterances.text: 测试一下调用吧，用这个音频文件。

understanding.scenarioPrompt: Transcribe and lightly normalize the audio into a clean, readable conversation transcript. Preserve meaning, infer speaker turns when possible, and correct obvious recognition errors without inventing facts.
